subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-12 in London
subcodes.first_line: This subject has been discussed among people for some time. As was mentioned previously, no one has the right to take revenge
subcodes.first_line_orig: این بحث بین افراد بود چنانچه ذکر شد بشر حقّ انتقام ندارد امّا اگر ملّتی تعدّی کند
subcodes.subjects: @kindness to and rights of animals, @justice and mercy, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance
